headline: CNBC Daily Open: Markets hold breath as Trump's Iran deadline nears
summary: Oil prices rose again as President Donald Trump stepped up his threats against Iran if Tehran does not come to a deal on the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Too Cheap To Ignore - 2 Stocks I Think The Market Is Getting Very Wrong
summary: Mosaic Company (MOS) is an inflation-sensitive, commodity-driven fertilizer producer, best viewed as a trading vehicle rather than a long-term compounder.
